mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weak consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real sales of existing homes and housing starts indicates robust housing demand and construction activity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns with Rank IC > 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the index of industrial production reflects weakening manufacturing output and supply-side bottlenecks, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines do not correspond to negative 20d returns during supply-constrained periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: High inflation months fail to predict negative 20d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms a strengthening labor market and rising corporate earnings expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields a Rank IC below 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding real gross domestic product reflects broad-based economic growth and higher corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDPC1 growth rates show no predictive power for 5-day forward returns (Rank IC < 0.02 over 10-year sample).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained acceleration in industrial production signals recovering manufacturing capacity and improving supply chain efficiency, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration thresholds fail to predict positive 60d returns with Rank IC > 0.03 over a 5-year rolling window.
